0.title: about
0.content: Hi! I am Danli. I am a first-year PhD in HCDE, University of Washington. I work at the intersection of materials intelligence and natures capacity. You can find my research work here: . I’m learning how to use jekyll, which this website is built upon.

1.title: contact
1.content: e-mail: danlil at uw dot edu .

2.title: home
2.content: Hi! This is Danli. This website is intended to showcase my progress in Prof. Nadya’s class, a special topic about digital fabrication in HCDE. I look forward to all the fun and creative discussions about to happen in this class. As a starter, I’m learning how to use Github and Jekyll. I hope by the end of this course I will be able to not only make things but also create things.
